reasoning: Emotional (60%): Warm golden band + saturated pink gem hit the bright/charming Hyrule palette perfectly. Round gem silhouette and toy-diorama scale feel friendly and inviting — no grimness. Color temperature is cheerful oranges/yellows/pinks consistent with Zelda accessory vocabulary. ~9/10 emotional. Technical (40%): 1px hard black outline is consistent around the full silhouette and band details. 2-3 tone hard shading visible on gold band (highlight/mid/shadow) and on pink gem facets. Pixels are grid-snapped with no sub-pixel antialiasing. Checkerboard pattern on band reads as intentional pixel-art texture, not AA. Hand-pixeled character is clear at all zoom levels. Compared to Denzi helmet reference, the ring matches that quality tier: clean outlines, structured shading, saturated palette. ~8/10 technical. Weighted: 0.6×9 + 0.4×8 = 8.6 → 8.
